mapper.select: select id, user_id, promo_code, status, is_deleted, create_user, update_user, create_time, update_time from promo_code_records where id = #{id} and is_deleted = 0
mapper.insert: insert into promo_code_records(id,user_id, promo_code, status, is_deleted, create_user, update_user, create_time, update_time) values (#{id},#{userId}, #{promoCode}, #{status}, #{isDeleted}, #{createUser}, #{updateUser}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})

insert into promo_code_records(id,user_id, promo_code, status, is_deleted, create_user, update_user, create_time, update_time) values
(#{entity.id},#{entity.userId}, #{entity.promoCode}, #{entity.status}, #{entity.isDeleted}, #{entity.createUser}, #{entity.updateUser}, #{entity.createTime}, #{entity.updateTime})

insert into promo_code_records(id,user_id, promo_code, status, is_deleted, create_user, update_user, create_time, update_time) values
(#{entity.id},#{entity.userId}, #{entity.promoCode}, #{entity.status}, #{entity.isDeleted}, #{entity.createUser}, #{entity.updateUser}, #{entity.createTime}, #{entity.updateTime})
on duplicate key update user_id = values(user_id), promo_code = values(promo_code), status = values(status), is_deleted = values(is_deleted), create_user = values(create_user), update_user = values(update_user), create_time = values(create_time), update_time = values(update_time)
